V1 Baseline.description: Basic SMA/RSI entry signals with 15-20d cooldowns. No ticker filters, no exit rules.

V2 Council-Tuned.description: Council parameters: 3% min return, volume 1.3x, sma50 slope, RSI>55, commodity blacklists.

V3 Composite Scoring.description: Signal scoring 0-10 with 7+ confirmations. SPY bull regime filter. RSI divergence detection.

V4 Council Design.description: Council-designed V4 (Gemini+MiMo+DeepSeek+Nemotron): 3D regime cube, ticker routing matrix, exit rules, position sizing. Never implemented — superseded by V5+.

V5 Profit-Max.description: Tightened all entries: MR RSI<30, divergence bonus, volume exhaustion. Breakout 2x vol + RSI>60.

V6 Ultra-Tight.description: MR RSI<25 + divergence bonus + 2d pullback. Momentum 5% 1mo + 1.5x vol. Breakout 2x vol + RSI>60.

V7 Exit Rules.description: Same ultra-tight entries as V6 + exit rules (trailing stops 3-5%, profit targets 4-6%, max hold 14d). Exit rules hurt performance — mean reversion needs full 21d snap-back.
V7 Exit Rules.lesson: Exit rules with trailing stops cut winners too early for mean reversion. The 21-day flat hold is superior.

V8 Strict Divergence.description: RSI<22 + divergence REQUIRED + 3d consecutive decline + volume collapse. Too restrictive — only 13 trades in 25 years.

V9 Volume + Decline.description: RSI<25 + 3d decline confirmation + volume collapse + weekly support. Divergence as bonus (not required).

V10 Combined Best.description: RSI<25 + below BB + 3d decline + volume exhaustion + support proximity + bull regime + ticker cleanup (removed CRM/XLK/META). The profit king.

V11 Score-Weighted.description: Score-weighted ≥8/10 only (skips 7/10 signals). RSI<25 + divergence + 3d decline + support + ATL. Quality over quantity.

V12 Ticker Routing.description: Ticker routing by regime: SPY/QQQ MR in bull only, GLD/SLV in all regimes, stocks require SMA200 filter.

V14 Signal Stacking.description: Signal stacking: MR + relative strength confirmation (3m return > -10%). Must have divergence OR 3-day decline.

V15 VIX Filter.description: V11 base + VIX < 25 filter. Removes trades during high-volatility regimes.

V17 Sector Limit.description: V11 base + max 2 same-sector trades per month. Reduces correlated position risk.

V18 Adaptive.description: Adaptive threshold: threshold=7 when recent WR>75%, threshold=8 otherwise. Self-calibrating system.

V19 Best Tickers.description: V11 on top 20 historical MR performers only (SPY/QQQ/AVGO/NVDA/AMD/AAPL/MSFT/AMZN/GOOGL/PLTR/TSLA/UNH/V/MA/JPM/GS/CAT/LLY/ABBV/NKE). Highest avg P&L (+3.86%).

overall.note: Highest avg P&L of any version

V21 Calendar.description: Calendar effects: only trade mid-month (days 5-20) on Tue-Thu. Avoids Monday/Friday and month-end.

V22 MultiAsset.description: Multi-asset confirmation: bonds + gold regime must align with MR entry. Filters out crisis and complacency.

V23 VIX Filter.description: VIX term structure: only trade MR when VIX >= 12 (filters out complacent markets). 5.10 PF — best ever.

V24 MomentumRes.description: Momentum resonance: MR + positive 3m return required. Filters out falling knives in sustained downtrends.

V25 DynamicExit.description: Same as V19 (best tickers) with VIX-tagged entries for dynamic exit simulation.

V26 Regime Rotation.description: Regime rotation: MR in bear markets (SPY<200d SMA), momentum pullbacks in bull markets. MR bear: 80% WR, +8.71% avg!

V27 VIX MR.description: VIX-filtered MR (same as V23, confirmed): only trade MR when VIX >= 12. 35 trades, +4.67% avg.

V28 RegimeRot.description: Regime rotation confirmed: momentum pullback in bull (62% WR, +2.05% avg across 2625 trades).

V29 BestOfAll.description: Combined best filters: bull pullback momentum (62% WR) + bear MR with VIX filter.

V30 Ultimate.description: Ultimate optimizer: strictest filters (divergence required, VIX<20, RSI 45-55). Too restrictive — 60.1% WR.

V31 ML RandomForest.description: ML-filtered MR: RandomForest trained on V3 trade features (12 dimensions: RSI, VR, ATR, BB dist, support dist, VIX, momentum). Only takes trades ML predicts as winners with >55% probability.

V35 ML GradientBoost.description: ML Gradient Boosting on all V3 MR signals: 60.6% WR, +1.96% avg. GB threshold=0.30 was too permissive — approved 8973 trades but diluted quality.

V32 VIX Sweet.description: VIX 12-22 MR: best VIX range for mean reversion. 88 trades in 25 years.

V34 VIX\u226512.description: VIX >= 12 only (no upper bound). V23 variant with more trades (133).

V36 Volume Tight.description: VR < 1.0 (tighter volume exhaustion). Only 49 trades — high conviction.

V41 RSI Sweet.description: RSI 23-27 sweet spot (not too deep). 54 trades.

V47 Bull MR.description: Bull market MR (price > SMA200, VIX>=12). 133 trades — most balanced.

V48 High ATR.description: High volatility bounce plays (ATR > median). 83 trades.

V49 Low ATR.description: Low volatility quiet MR (ATR < 0.8× median). Only 11 trades.

V50 Full Conviction.description: Ultra-strict: RSI<22 + VR<0.8 + 3d decline + VIX 12-22 + 50d support. Only 1 trade in 25 years.

V51 SPY/QQQ Pairs.description: Pairs trading: SPY vs QQQ spread MR. Short overvalued, long undervalued.

V55 AAPL/MSFT Pairs.description: Pairs trading: AAPL vs MSFT spread MR. Mega-cap tech pair.

V56 Options MR Safe.description: Options-based: MR with VIX<20 for safe put credit spreads.

V57 Options Deep.description: Deep MR + VIX 15-25 for elevated premium put selling.

V58 Options LowVol.description: Low VIX < 15 MR for cheap, high-probability put credit spreads.

V59 Options HighVol.description: High VIX >= 25 MR. Expensive puts during fear spikes.

V60 Crash Protection.description: 3d decline + VIX spike >= 22. Crash protection put signals.

V61 Multi RiskOn.description: MR in risk-on regime (bonds down, VIX<20).

V62 Multi Growth.description: MR in growth regime (bonds up, gold up).

V65 Triple Confirm.description: All three confirm: bonds + gold + VIX 12-22.

V68 Narrow Tech.description: Only tech confirms (QQQ up, SPY/IWM down). Contrarian MR.

V71 BearMomentum.description: Bear market momentum: RSI>55 in SPY<200d regime. Contrarian.

V72 BullFlag.description: Bull flag breakout: consolidation + volume expansion.

V73 GapFill.description: Gap fill MR: small gap down + oversold.

V76 MomentumAccel.description: Momentum acceleration: RSI rising >5pts in 5 days.

V77 SupportBounce.description: 200d SMA support bounce with oversold RSI.

V79 VolSqueeze.description: Low vol squeeze: ATR<0.7x + RSI>55 + volume spike.

V81 Engulfing.description: Bullish engulfing candle pattern in uptrend.

V82 DojiReversal.description: Doji candle after 3d decline. Indecision + trend reversal.

V83 InsideDay.description: Inside day breakout: narrow range + volume expansion.

V84 VWAPDeviation.description: Price >5% from 20d MA with oversold RSI.

V85 TripleBottom.description: Triple bottom: 3 tests of same support level.

V86 SeasonalMR.description: Seasonal MR: Nov-Dec, Mar-Apr, Jul-Aug strong months.

V91 RiskParity.description: Risk parity portfolio: equal-weight MR + momentum.

V92 KellySizing.description: Kelly-optimal sizing: scale position by confidence score (6-10).

V93 AllWeather.description: All-weather MR: works in any market regime.

V94 RegimeEnsemble.description: Regime-switching ensemble: momentum in bull, MR in bear.

V95 TrendMR.description: Trend + MR hybrid: rising 200dMA + short-term oversold.

V96 BestMR.description: V23 best: VIX>=12 MR. Most proven single strategy.

V97 BearMR.description: V26 bear MR: SPY<SMA200 + RSI<25. 80% WR strategy.

V98 CombinedBest.description: Combined V23 + V26: bull MR (VIX>=12) OR bear MR.

V100 FinalConviction.description: Full conviction: all proven conditions met simultaneously. 18 trades/25yr.

summary.exit_simulation: Held for 21 trading days, exit simulated at close price
summary.best_version: V23 VIX-Filtered MR + V26 Bear MR combo

geopolitical_analysis.description: How prediction strategies perform during different geopolitical regimes. Data from 25-year backtest across major market events.

events.market_impact: NASDAQ fell 78%. Broad market crash. Bear market lasting 2.5 years.
events.lesson: Mean reversion with bull regime filter would have avoided most downside. Strategies without SPY>200d SMA filter underperformed.

events.market_impact: S&P 500 fell 57%. Systemic banking crisis. Extreme volatility (VIX >80).
events.best_strategies: Mean reversion (deep oversold bounces), Sector rotation (defensive)
events.worst_strategies: Momentum, Breakout (failed completely in bear market)
events.lesson: V2's bull regime filter (SPY>200d) reduced momentum/breakout losses significantly. V3's ATR cap on breakout and RSI divergence for mean reversion further protected capital.

events.market_impact: Zero interest rates. Massive central bank liquidity. Strongest bull run in history.
events.best_strategies: Momentum, Breakout (everything worked in rising tide)
events.worst_strategies: Mean reversion (fewer oversold opportunities in steady uptrend)
events.lesson: Momentum and breakout dominate in liquidity-driven bull markets. V3's composite scoring captured the strongest trends while filtering minor pullbacks.

events.market_impact: Fastest 30% crash in history (23 days). V-shaped recovery fueled by unprecedented stimulus. Tech mega-cap explosion.
events.best_strategies: Mean reversion (bought March bottom), Momentum (rode tech recovery)
events.worst_strategies: Sector rotation (too slow to rotate into tech)
events.lesson: Mean reversion with RSI<25 captured the March 2020 bottom perfectly. V3's RSI divergence detector was specifically designed for this pattern. Momentum rode NVDA/AAPL/PLTR recovery.

events.market_impact: Fed hiked rates from 0% to 5.5%. S&P 500 fell 25% in 2022. Growth stocks crushed.
events.worst_strategies: Momentum (high multiple growth stocks collapsed), Breakout
events.lesson: V3's composite scoring and bull regime filter proved critical here. Momentum/breakout would have been disastrous without the SPY>200d SMA check. Mean reversion buying XLE/energy selloffs was the winning play.

events.market_impact: NVDA up 10x. AI mania. Magnificent 7 driving S&P 500. FOMO and concentration risk.
events.best_strategies: Momentum (NVDA, PLTR, TSLA), Breakout (tech breakouts worked)
events.worst_strategies: Sector rotation (missed tech concentration), Mean reversion (few signals in one-way rally)
events.lesson: Top ticker routing (PLTR, NVDA, TSLA get 1.5x sizing) captures the mega-cap winners. V3 momentum scoring with RSI zone 55-75 filters out exhausted rallies.

current_risk_factors: US-China trade tensions and semiconductor export controls
Middle East geopolitical instability and oil supply risk
Canadian housing market and consumer debt levels
Iran conflict impact on energy prices (13% UK energy bill increase)

regime_adaptation.description: Strategies automatically adapt based on detected market regime

polymarket_sentiment.description: Live prediction market probabilities for market-relevant events. Used as a sentiment overlay in V5+ filtering — trades only enter when Polymarket probability aligns with the strategy direction at >60% confidence.
polymarket_sentiment.how_used: V5 5-Layer Filter — Layer 3: Polymarket Triangulation. Three independent Polymarket markets must all align with the trade direction: (1) SPY daily direction, (2) Fed rate path (3m window), (3) Macro regime (recession/inflation). Each must show >55% probability in the trade's favor. This eliminates trades against crowd consensus during uncertain periods.

top_markets.question: Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 25 bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the June 2026 meeting?
Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
MicroStrategy sells any Bitcoin by March 31, 2026?
MicroStrategy sells any Bitcoin by December 31, 2026?
Will 2 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Will 1 Fed rate cut happen in 2026?
Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the July 2026 meeting?
Will the Fed decrease interest rates by 50+ bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Will the price of Bitcoin be above $68,000 on June 2?
Will the price of Bitcoin be above $66,000 on June 2?

v5_design.the_philosophy: 95% accuracy requires a paradigm shift from 'let winners run' to 'take profit immediately at first sign of profit and never let a trade reverse.' Each trade is targetting +1-2% with near-certainty, not +10% with 60% probability.
v5_design.the_tradeoff: Average P&L drops from +1.37% (V3) to ~+1.1% (V5). But compounding is dramatically better with 1/4 the drawdown and near-zero probability of consecutive losers.

layer_1_multi_tf_trinity.name: Multi-TF Trinity (Gemini)
layer_1_multi_tf_trinity.description: Monthly uptrend + Weekly pullback + Daily extreme — all 3 timeframes must align. Monthly chart is the trump card.
layer_1_multi_tf_trinity.implementation: Monthly: close > 5mo SMA. Weekly: RSI(14) 40-60 (pullback zone). Daily: RSI(14) < 30 (oversold entry)

layer_2_regime_perfect_storm.name: Regime Perfect Storm (MiMo)
layer_2_regime_perfect_storm.description: VIX 12-22, SPY > 200d SMA rising, breadth > 60%, VIX contango, put/call ratio 0.4-0.7 — all must align.
layer_2_regime_perfect_storm.implementation: 9-cell VIX × SPY regime matrix with per-cell exit adjustments. Cell I (VIX>22 + Bear) = 100% cash.

layer_3_polymarket_triangulation.name: Polymarket Triangulation (New!)
layer_3_polymarket_triangulation.description: Three independent Polymarket markets must agree: SPY direction + Fed rate path + macro regime. Each >55% probability.

layer_4_ml_gate.name: ML Probability Gate (Gemini/DeepSeek)
layer_4_ml_gate.description: Logistic regression on 24 features from V1-V3 trade data. Only signals with ML probability > 80% pass.

layer_5_ticker_allocation.name: Ticker-Specific Alpha (All Council)
layer_5_ticker_allocation.description: Only 10+ proven tickers with documented edge. Each ticker has a regime-specific conviction score.

exit_rules.layer_1_hard_stop: 0.8x to 1.5x ATR(14) depending on strategy (Mean Rev tightest at 0.8x)
exit_rules.layer_2_breakeven: Move stop to breakeven at +0.5% gain (activates Day 0 or Day 1)
exit_rules.layer_3_scalp_target: Take 100% profit at +1.5% to +3.0% depending on strategy
exit_rules.layer_4_micro_trail: Trailing stop at 1.5% from peak (tightest for Mean Rev)
exit_rules.layer_5_time_stop: Max hold 3-7 days depending on strategy

council_consensus: Score thresholds raised to ≥8/10 for all strategies (was 6-7 in V3)
80% of capital in cash, waiting for perfect setups
Mean Reversion remains the alpha engine — tightest exits, highest WR
Polymarket sentiment added as Layer 3 filter — eliminates trades against crowd during uncertainty
Triple timeframe confirmation eliminates 70% of false signals
Exit rules are the single biggest gap from V1-V3 — now fully addressed

evolution.description: The journey from V1 to V10: 10 iterations of strategy tuning across 25 years of market data. Mean Reversion emerged as the dominant strategy.
evolution.best_strategy: V23 (VIX>12 MR) + V26 (Bear MR) + V28 (Bull Momentum)
key_innovations: Commodity exclusion (V2): Eliminated -1.5% drag from UNG/WEAT/CPER
Bull regime filter (V3): SPY>200d SMA prevents bear market losses
RSI depth + divergence (V5): <30 RSI + divergence bonus
Volume exhaustion (V6): <1.3x avg volume confirms capitulation
3-day decline (V9): Price making lower highs/lows for 3 days
Score-weighted entry (V11): Only ≥8/10 signals, skip marginal 7/10
Sector correlation limits (V17): Max 2 same-sector trades per month
Ticker routing by regime (V12): Route instruments to optimal market conditions
VIX filter (V23): VIX >= 12 eliminates complacent market trades, boosting PF to 5.10
Bear market MR (V26): 80% WR with +8.71% avg during SPY<200d SMA — the holy grail
Regime rotation (V28): Momentum pullbacks in bull (62% WR, 2625 trades) + MR in bear
Multi-asset confirmation (V22): Bonds + gold regime alignment validates MR entries
what_didnt_work: Exit rules with trailing stops (V7): Cut winners too early
Mandatory divergence (V8): Too few signals passed
Sector Rotation: Underperformed across ALL versions
Weekly RSI > 30 (V13): Too restrictive, 5 trades in 25 years
Weekly MA alignment (V16): Only 2 trades passed price > 50d + 200d SMA filters
Ultimate hybrid (V20): Zero trades passed all filters simultaneously
Calendar effects (V21): Removing Monday/Friday/month-end missed too many good trades
Ultimate optimizer (V30): Too many stacked filters killed all signals
evolution.ml_findings: ML models (RF/GB) trained on V3 features showed test accuracy ~65% but overfit on small signal sets. Best use: as an additional confirmation layer, not primary decision maker.
